configuration.jsScript: var a = msg.a || 0; var b = msg.b || 0; var op = msg.op || 'add'; var result = 0; switch(op) { case 'add': result = a + b; break; case 'sub': result = a - b; break; case 'mul': result = a * b; break; case 'div': result = b !== 0 ? a / b : 'Error: division by zero'; break; default: result = 'Unknown operation: ' + op; } msg.result = result; msg.expression = a + ' ' + op + ' ' + b + ' = ' + result; return {'msg': msg, 'metadata': metadata, 'msgType': msgType};
